creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-21 20:20:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    emulators            Makefile 
  Added files:
    emulators/tme        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    emulators/tme/files  patch-libtme-module.c 
  Log:
  The Machine Emulator provides a general-purpose framework
  for computer emulation.  Right now it can emulate Sun 2/120 and
  3/150.
  
  WWW:    http://theory.lcs.mit.edu/~fredette/tme/
  
  PR:             ports/106839
  Submitted by:   trasz <trasz at pin.if.uz.zgora.pl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.207     +1 -0      ports/emulators/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/emulators/tme/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/emulators/tme/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/emulators/tme/files/patch-libtme-module.c (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/emulators/tme/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +100 -0    ports/emulators/tme/pkg-plist (new)
